summary: Funnel Tracking & Smart Paywall feature set fully tested. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend components verified: PricingPage shows Free tier + 4 subscription plans + 4 topups fetched from backend (not hardcoded), with correct badges (POPULAR on Monthly, BEST VALUE on Quarterly, BEST DEAL on Yearly). Billing page shows same plans. UpgradeModal and PostValueOverlay components exist in codebase with correct data-testid attributes but require specific triggers (generation completion, credit limits) to display. Landing page fires landing_view funnel event on load.
critical_code_review_comments: pricing_api.py: Clean implementation returning plans and topups from single source of truth (config/pricing.py)
funnel_tracking.py: Good use of get_admin_user dependency for metrics endpoint, accepts all 11 funnel steps with rich context
funnelTracker.js: Fire-and-forget pattern prevents UI blocking, auto-generates session_id if missing
UpgradeModal.js: Fetches plans from /api/pricing-catalog/plans, has 'Continue with limited access' soft exit, integrates with Cashfree
PostValueOverlay.jsx: Triggers based on ProductGuideContext progress.total_generations, connects to paywall via onTriggerPaywall callback
PricingPage.js: Fetches plans from backend, shows Free tier + 4 subscriptions + 4 topups with correct badges
Landing.js: Fires landing_view funnel event on mount (line 87)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Funnel tracking system is fully operational. All 11 funnel steps (landing_view, first_action_click, generation_started, generation_completed, result_viewed, second_action, paywall_viewed, plan_selected, payment_started, payment_abandoned, payment_success) are tracked with rich context (source_page, device, generation_count, plan_shown, plan_selected). Admin metrics endpoint at /api/funnel/metrics returns conversion/drop-off percentages, device_breakdown, source_breakdown, and paywall_micro_funnel. Pricing catalog at /api/pricing-catalog/plans returns 4 subscription plans (weekly, monthly, quarterly, yearly) and 4 topup packs. UpgradeModal and PostValueOverlay are wired in App.js but require specific triggers to display.
